headline: Trump Wants to Ban Institutional Investors From Buying Up Homes. A Housing Bill Loophole Could Defeat That Purpose.
summary: The housing bill is meant, in part, to prevent institutional investors from buying up homes. Critics say a loophole allows them to continue doing just that.
